achievements.title: Goldleaf Plains
achievements.description: Finish the Castle in World 1 'Goldleaf Plains'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Golden Leafs in the Goldleaf Plains
achievements.description: Collect all Star Coins in World 1 'Goldleaf Plains'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: On Top of the Trees of the Goldleaf Plains
achievements.description: Reach the Top of all Flagpoles in World 1 'Goldleaf Plains' in one Session.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Yoshi in the Goldleaf Plains
achievements.description: Collect all Yoshi Coins in four Levels of World 1 'Goldleaf Plains' in one Session.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.description: Collect all Star Coins in World 5 'Moonview Glacier'.

achievements.description: Reach the Top of all Flagpoles in World 5 'Moonview Glacier'.

achievements.title: Yoshi in the Moonshine Glacier
achievements.description: Collect all Yoshi Coins in one Level of World 5 'Moonview Glacier' in one Session.

achievements.description: Finish the Airship in World 6 'Lunar Realm'.

achievements.description: Finish the Castle in World 7 'Cirrus Heavens'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Golden Sunshines in the Cirrus Heavens
achievements.description: Collect all Star Coins in World 7 'Cirrus Heavens'.

achievements.description: Collect all Yoshi Coins in two Levels of World 7 'Cirrus Heavens' in one Session.

achievements.title: Koopa Country
achievements.description: Finish the Palast in World 8 'Koopa Country'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Golden Koopas in the Koopa Country
achievements.description: Collect all Star Coins in World 8 'Koopa Country'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: On Top of the Volcanos in Koopa Country
achievements.description: Reach the Top of all Flagpoles in World 8 'Koopa Country'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Yoshi in the Koopa Country
achievements.description: Collect all Yoshi Coins in two Levels of World 8 'Koopa Country' in one Session.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Buried between Bones and Dirt
achievements.description: Find the 3-Up Moon in World 4 'Pumpkin Boneyard'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Around Magma and spiky Snakes
achievements.description: Find the first 3-Up Moon in World 8 'Koopa Country'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Above the Image of Evil
achievements.description: Find the second 3-Up Moon in World 8 'Koopa Country'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: I have seen everything!
achievements.description: Clear all Exits and use all of the Cannons at least once.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Where did all my Money go?
achievements.description: Collect all 240 Star Coins and spent all of them.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: That's a familiar Sound
achievements.description: Finish a Level with 11, 22, 33, 44, 55, 66, 77, 88 or 99 as the last digits on the Timer to spawn a Mushroom House.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: We are the Super Mario Brothers
achievements.description: Play as Mario and Luigi in one Session.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Waterskeeting for Coins
achievements.description: Collect at least 150 Coins in W2-A 'Hydroskip Drain' before reaching a Flag-Room.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Bossbattle in Slowmotion has Style
achievements.description: Defeat Bowser Jr. in W6-Tower 'Shockbelt Spire' without shooting any Fireballs or using the Mega Mushroom.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Racing the Rainbow
achievements.description: Reach the Checkpoint of W6-5 'Runbow Road' without using a Dash Block.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Flying for 50 Gold Coins
achievements.description: Collect at least 50 Coins in W7-7 'Ballistic Breach' before reaching the Flag-Room.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Why do you hit yourself?
achievements.description: Defeat Bowser Jr. in W8-Tower 'Lavalit Tower' without shooting any Fireballs, using the Mega Mushroom or touching a Shell.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Watch out for falling Rocks
achievements.description: Finish W8-5 'Basalt Bay' in a single Shellslide after the first Slope.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Thank you for playing my Game!
achievements.description: Collect at least 400 Coins in the Credits.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Let's revisit this Place
achievements.description: Let Mario and Luigi run through all Worlds in the Titlescreen in a single Session.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: From Tiny to Big
achievements.description: Find the Mega-Mushroom Secret in World 3 'Dorrie's Island'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Greed is a Deadly Sin
achievements.description: Trigger a hidden Coin Rain in World 4-4 'Bone Marrow Road'.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Weather Ghost Ballet
achievements.description: Find the Secret Level WA-C, beat it and collect all three Star Coins.
achievements.author: SporyTike
